title: Resolution Adopting the Mtpfrb 2021-01 Dated January 20, 2021 Entitled ?resolution Allowing Another Batch of Tricycle Operators/owners with Expired Franchises Affected by the Implementation of Community Quarantine Due to Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) in the Municipality of Los Baños to Apply for Renewal of Franchise Until February 28, 2021.?
